git_board.placeholder_desc: Aggregates PRs / issues relevant to me from git.k2lab.ai, grouped into WIP / Under Review / Reviewing / Reviewed columns. Coming with PR-16b after Gitea API integration.

agents.placeholder_desc: Visualizes all agent teams running in ghostty / tmux. Supports spawning new agents and live output. Coming with PR-17.

court_runtime.subtitle: Existing dashboard moved into this menu. Orchestrator health / pending approvals / watcher / receiver / tmux all live here.
